title: proporeuomai #4313
definition:
1) to send before, to make to precede
 2) to go before one
    2a) of a leader
    2b) of a messenger or a herald
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to send before, to make to precede
 2) to go before one
    2a) of a leader
    2b) of a messenger or a herald

    NASB:  to make to go before, to cause to go before:
